info.name: Pioneer DDJ-FLX4 HID
info.author: djsugar
info.description: HID mapping for Pioneer DDJ-FLX4 via USB HID interface (Android). This mapping handles the controller when it is detected as an HID device (interface #5, VID 0x2B73, PID 0x0045) rather than MIDI, which is the typical case on Android.
